texto: I'm generally slow to anger, quick to forgive, and I take in information before making decisions. So no matter how controversial the decision, my general demeanour is to put on white lab coat and gloves and look at the evidence, weigh the arguments and see what makes sense.
explicacao: Citação de Peter Blair Henry sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I'm generally slow to anger, quick to forgive, and I take in information before making decisions.…” articula amor, decision, decisions em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como decisions.
